name: Cranford Golf Studio
about: Cranford Golf Studio is a golf simulator venue located in downtown Cranford, NJ. They feature industry-leading TrackMan technology used by PGA TOUR players, offering real-time feedback and precision. The venue provides a fun, relaxing atmosphere accessible before sunrise and after sunset, making it suitable for various skill levels and occasions.
why_golfers_like_it: Industry-leading TrackMan simulator technology for precise swing analysis
Extended hours availability for early morning and late-night sessions
Wide range of services including lessons, leagues, and group packages

food_and_drink.notes: BYOB allowed based on venue type and common practice

simulator_hardware.notes: Industry-leading radar technology used by PGA TOUR players

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Club rentals are available on-site if needed.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Food service is available on-site, and BYOB policy is typically allowed.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Playing time varies depending on your group size and pace, typically 2-3 hours.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Cranford Golf Studio welcomes families and is suitable for children.
